subject: Sociology
title: Interfaith Dialogue and Pluralism
description: A short lesson to help you apply Interfaith Dialogue and Pluralism.

hook.text: A rabbi, imam, and pastor walk into a room. It's not a joke — it's Tuesday at the interfaith council.

buildup.text: Religious pluralism means multiple faiths coexist in one society, each claiming truth while sharing space.

discovery.text: Interfaith dialogue doesn't require agreement. It requires enough trust to disagree without violence.

twist.text: Pluralism challenges every religion inside. If other faiths hold truth, is your path the only one?

climax.text: Managing religious diversity is one of modern society's great challenges and greatest achievements.
